title: fragaria reptans
intro: Fragaria reptans, also known as wild strawberry or creeping strawberry, is a type of low-growing, spreading plant that belongs to the rose family. This perennial plant is native to Europe and North America and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragaria reptans include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Fragaria reptans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, anxiety, and skin problems.
